description_for_human: Ovlada Mapove okno pres SignalR runtime.
description_for_model: Use this plugin when the user wants to inspect or control an active map-window-app instance. The Teams webapp connects to Azure SignalR and forwards tool requests to the browser-side Mapove okno MCP plugin. Use webcomponent_api_list before invoking unknown methods. Use webcomponent_dom_event_subscribe and webcomponent_dom_event_pull when the user asks what happened in the map. Mutating calls through webcomponent_api_invoke can change the map state and should be used only when the user requests the action.

functions.name: webcomponent_api_list
functions.description: Lists callable methods and readable properties exposed by the map-window-app public API.

returns.description: JSON object with methods and properties.

functions.name: webcomponent_api_get
functions.description: Reads a property from the map-window-app public API.

sessionId.description: Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.

property.description: Name of the public API getter property.

returns.description: JSON object with the property value.

functions.name: webcomponent_api_invoke
functions.description: Invokes a method from the map-window-app public API with JSON-compatible arguments.

sessionId.description: Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.

method.description: Name of the public API method to call.

items.description: One JSON-serialized argument value. The SignalR runtime must decode these before calling the browser MCP tool.

returns.description: JSON object with method result or error.

confirmation.title: Zavolat API Mapoveho okna?
confirmation.body: Tato akce muze zmenit stav otevrene mapy.

functions.name: webcomponent_dom_event_subscribe
functions.description: Subscribes the SignalR runtime to DOM events emitted by map-window-app.

sessionId.description: Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.

eventName.description: Exact event name or * for all events.

returns.description: JSON object with subscribed event names.

functions.name: webcomponent_dom_event_pull
functions.description: Reads captured events from the map-window-app MCP event queue.

sessionId.description: Optional SignalR session id. Defaults to mo-teams-app.

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return.

clear.description: Whether returned events should be removed from the queue.

returns.description: JSON object with captured event entries.

conversation_starters.title: Dostupne schopnosti mapy
conversation_starters.text: Jake metody a API providery ma aktualni mapa k dispozici?
